calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment Entered On 10/04/2013 And Proposed Order
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jonathan Vaknin, Esq., 415-851-5297, appearance@vakninlaw.com, Specially Appearing for Plaintiff Asset Acceptance LLC
No other appearances.

No argument held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER SILVA'S Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment Entered On 10/04/2013 And Proposed Order

Defendant's unopposed "motion to vacate the renewal of judgment entered on 10/04/13" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
